full_text:
Zhuge Hui (Daoming) 諸葛恢 (道明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Hui (諸葛恢), styledDaoming (道明). Son of Zhuge Jing and therefore a grandson of Zhuge Dan. Zhuge Hui was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
